title: isp-v1
description: ISP account service contract v1 — 10 operations across broadband monitoring, outage tracking, billing, and line diagnostics for residential and business ISP accounts.

operations.name: info
operations.description: Account health check — connection status, customer details, service count

operations.name: services
operations.description: List broadband and telephony services with plan, speed tier, technology type

operations.name: usage
operations.description: Current billing period usage — download, upload, remaining, percentage used

operations.name: outages
operations.description: Active and scheduled outages — network events, provider outages, infrastructure maintenance

operations.name: billing
operations.description: Transaction history grouped by billing period with amounts and payment status

operations.name: tickets
operations.description: Support tickets — reference, status, subject, dates

operations.name: diagnostics_list
operations.description: Available line diagnostic tests and recent test history

operations.name: diagnostics_run
operations.description: Execute a line diagnostic test (loopback, line state, port reset)
